Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Hmm... I feel a strange aura around you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}In my mind, I see visions... People's pasts, presents, and futures...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}For most people, I see clearly and far ahead...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}But you are different... Your future is filled with both blinding light and stagnant shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}I can see but a small portion... What lies beyond that is shrouded in mystery...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}What a peculiar fate you carry...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Now, young man... Bearer of light and shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}If you wish to know more about the near future... come and talk to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}I will share my limited visions with you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Now, tell me... What shall it be?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Would you like to know your fortune?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Let us hope that you find fortune in your destiny...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Come back any time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}You have pulled fate's trigger...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}The bullet passes through many, heading directly to its target...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}What target that may be, however, is unknown to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}You must find that out for yourself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}A long rail under the empty sky... On it stands youth in disarray...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}You seem to live a tumultuous life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}What do you see at the end of the rail...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}I feel another change...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}A strong wind blows across the world, sending a blue flower's petals into the air...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}How will you interpret this wind...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}As a weak and frail breeze, or a brave and mighty gust...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}It seems you have made another friend...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}A late-night affair, unseen by all... A bond made in the darkness, where the shadows lurk...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}The result of this bond is too distant to be seen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}The only way to know how it will end is to see for yourself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Shadows within shadows... Many shadows crawl amidst the immense shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Twelve shadows feasting upon the heart of man... Monstrous, yet dignified...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}They gather around you... Beware...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Guns scattered in the billowing shadow... Arms reach in to grasp them...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Their muzzles pointed at different shadows; their triggers pulled on different occasions...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Where do you point your gun? What will occur as a result of its firing...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Can you collect all the guns that have been scattered...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}She stands between light and dark, life and simulacrum...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}She falters... as if not knowing on which side she belongs...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Hm...? She is trying to tell you something...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Can you hear her words...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Three blades close in on you, tearing the shadow apart... A brave howl confronts them...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Things seem to be stirring around you once again...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}In the depths of the abyss, another blade watches you closely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}A dark past sinking into the deep shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}It enfolds the people who are involved and captures them...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Who are the ones that are trapped...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Hard though I try to see them, my vision blurs, and everything becomes obscure...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}The golden sky spreads outside the window... A girl holding a world of white in her slender arms...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}A boy struggles, searching to find meaning in himself and the girl...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}But the conclusion has not yet been written... It is entrusted to the girl and her white world...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}You must stand firmly, and watch things unfold...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}After the storm comes not calm, but another trial...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Do not despair, however...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}I sense strong forces at your side, even more so than before...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Be brave, and confront this hardship with unshakeable resolve...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}A light has disappeared... The shadow grows darker...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}But the lost light's will lives on in a strong, new light...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}You have reached a turning point... The light has begun to challenge the shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Your time is coming... soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}A strong wind blows across the world, sending a blue flower's petals into the air...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}The flower discovered the world, made friends to protect, and has become another light...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}The lights are gathering around you... Be prepared...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}A bridge lit by the full moon... Songs of victory echo in the air as the shadow is overcome...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Go... Now is the time for celebration...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Under the fat crescent moon... a feeble light at the hollow tower...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}A gunshot rings out, shattering my vision into a thousand pieces...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}I am sorry... I can see no further...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}But I can say this... The shadow yet remains...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Oh...? Is this a new friend...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}How mystifying... No one can see into his essence...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}No one, save for one girl...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}The answer and the secret to life are passed on, one life to the next...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Two lights now pierce through the shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}The hour draws near... How do you fare...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}A girl falls under the full moon... A boy walks amidst shadow, and he himself is shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}A child who bears shadows within...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}The immense shadow approaches... Its depth unfathomable; its extent without limit...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}It comes to end all things... The darkness hidden by the shining heavens...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}How will you stand against such a fate...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}You have pulled the trigger of fate...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}I see it now... The target was the shadow of impending doom...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Your goal is now clear...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Keep your flame of life ablaze until the end...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}No... What I see is nothingness... It is the void...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}But do not lose heart... Emptiness is not necessarily the end...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}The void is infinite... as is the universe...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Whether this marks an end to all things or a beginning...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}It is in your hands...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Too much of a good thing can turn things for the worse... The same is true for fortune telling.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}You have already learned of your fortune for today... Return another day if you seek it again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}What kind of fortune do you seek?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Increases chances of encountering rare enemies in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Increases chances of inflicting enemies with ailments in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Increases chances of enemies turning into strong or rare enemies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Prevents unfavorable events, such as the Reaper appearing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Increases the rate at which Theurgy gauges charge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What kind of fortune should I ask for?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}If that is what you wish, it will be {f 2 4 0} yen... You are sure this is what you want?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Ah, you wish to reconsider... Is there perhaps another fortune you would like?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}I'm afraid you don't have enough money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}If you go to the tower of shadow tonight... you are destined to face an adversary clad in gold...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}The chance of encountering rare Shadows has increased{f 0 1 27} when exploring Tartarus![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}If you go to the tower of shadow tonight... you are destined to gain advantage in conflicts...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}The chance of inflicting enemies with status ailments has increased{f 0 1 27} when exploring Tartarus![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}If you go to the tower of shadow tonight... you will surely feel a powerful drive from within...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All allies' {f 0 1 2}Theurgy gauges will charge faster{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}If you go to the tower of shadow tonight... your destiny holds a double-edged sword...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}The chance of events occurring that turn all Shadows on a floor into rare or strong Shadows has increased{f 0 1 27} when exploring Tartarus![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}If you go to the tower of shadow tonight... your destiny holds a moment of tranquility...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Unlucky events (such as {f 0 1 2}all Shadows turning into strong Shadows{f 0 1 27}, {f 0 1 2}Dark Zones appearing{f 0 1 27}, or {f 0 1 2}the Reaper emerging{f 0 1 27}) will not occur in Tartarus![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Oh...? It appears that there has been a change within you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Well, allow me to provide you with a new fortune befitting the unusual light that you hold within.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You are now able to select the new fortune, {f 0 1 2}Soul Fortune{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}Oh my... There is a haze surrounding the tower of shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 404}It seems you won't be entering the tower tonight. Please return another day for your fortune.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh...? The shadow that envelops you has become even darker...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm afraid I am unable to provide you with words that can guide you at this time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I may be able to once the full moon passes... Please return another day for your fortune.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_107_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You are now able to select the new fortune, {f 0 1 2}Rarity Fortune{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You are now able to select the new fortune, {f 0 1 2}Gamble Fortune{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_109_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You are now able to select the new fortune, {f 0 1 2}Blighting Fortune{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_110_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You are now able to select the new fortune, {f 0 1 2}Safety Fortune{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}
